description: Discord notifications and bidirectional integration — push notifications on agent events, receive slash commands, approve requests with buttons, gather community intelligence, run multi-agent sessions in threads, and deploy proactive suggestions

capabilityDescriptions.companies.read: Read AoA company data for per-company channel routing
capabilityDescriptions.projects.read: Read AoA project data for issue context and channel routing
capabilityDescriptions.issues.read: Read AoA issues to post notifications and populate Discord embeds
capabilityDescriptions.issue.comments.read: Read AoA issue comments for bridging to Discord threads
capabilityDescriptions.issues.create: Create AoA issues from Discord slash commands
capabilityDescriptions.issues.update: Update AoA issue status from Discord approval buttons and commands
capabilityDescriptions.agents.read: Read AoA agent status for /clip status and /clip agents commands
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.create: Start new agent sessions from Discord threads
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.send: Send messages to agent sessions from Discord threads
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.close: Close agent sessions initiated from Discord
capabilityDescriptions.agents.invoke: Invoke AoA agents from Discord slash commands and handoffs
capabilityDescriptions.events.subscribe: Listen for issue, approval, and agent lifecycle events
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.read: Read stored channel mappings, session registry, and escalation state
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.write: Store channel mappings, session registry, intelligence signals, and escalation state
capabilityDescriptions.http.outbound: Send HTTPS requests to discord.com APIs
capabilityDescriptions.secrets.read-ref: Resolve Discord bot token and AoA board API key from the secrets store
capabilityDescriptions.webhooks.receive: Receive Discord interaction payloads (slash commands, button clicks)
capabilityDescriptions.activity.log.write: Log approval decisions and agent actions to the AoA activity log
capabilityDescriptions.metrics.write: Emit notification count, command, and intelligence metrics
capabilityDescriptions.agent.tools.register: Expose discord_signals, escalate_to_human, handoff_to_agent, discuss_with_agent, register_custom_command, and register_watch tools to AoA agents
capabilityDescriptions.jobs.schedule: Register recurring jobs for intelligence scans, escalation timeouts, and daily digests
capabilityDescriptions.events.emit: Emit plugin events for cross-plugin coordination (e.g. ACP handoff)
